title: Admin Command Tool
description: Easily Apply in-game commands and set custom commands with hotkeys.
body:
## **An in-game GUI tool for server admins and operators. Press the hotkey G to open a menu where you can:**

**Report Bugs Here** : https://discord.gg/qc4TrREeMf


![Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d33a13afa96b86f848033453a38348ae2f3ce5d6.jpeg)

- **Teleport players** to any coordinate or to other players.

- **Locate biomes** and **structures** by ID.

- **Give custom items** with dynamic stack size, fill inventory, or clear it.

- **Spawn any entity** with custom count and NBT data.

- **Apply status effects** with configurable duration and amplifier.

- **Toggle game rules** and change their numeric values.

![Custom items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa3243127cd60b5ea8e27d849cd2e18117012835.jpeg)

- **Enchant items** with any enchantment at any level & add custom **Attributes**.

- **Give or remove** recipes from players.

- **Kill** hostile, peaceful, or specific mobs and clear ground items.

- **Manage** time, weather, difficulty, gamemode, and tick rate.

- **Manage** player health, hunger, and XP levels on any player.

- **Create custom command** presets with auto-repeat and configurable execution count and **Assign** hotkeys.

- **Player stats display** showing HP, food, XP, armor.

- And many more.

### **No need to memorize slash commands. Just makes managing your Minecraft world a little bit easier.**
